unsorted.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[2, 0])

sparse.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[0, 2])

absent.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[0, 3])

duplicate.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[0, 0])
duplicate.error: ValueError: cannot reindex on an axis with duplicate labels

negative.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[-1])

empty.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[])

horizons_allhorizons.command: did_imputation(panel, y="Y", i="unit", t="t", Ei="Ei", fe=["unit", "t"], aw="w", minn=0, horizons=[0, 1], allhorizons=True)
horizons_allhorizons.error: ValueError: Options horizons and allhorizons cannot be combined
